chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.1429 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of bail application ------------------------------------------------------ 13.02.2026 Mr. Sharafuddin Kanhar, A.P.G. & Ms. Rukhsana Qassim Mirjat, ADPP --------------------------------------------- Progress report is received from learned trial Court, which reveals that the case has been disposed of vide judgment dated 26.12.2025, in view of such position, instant criminal bail application is dismissed as having become infructuous. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
